diagrams.title: OS Layered Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchical structure of operating system with hardware at bottom, kernel in middle, system programs above, and user interface at top
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS components are organized and interact

diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Illustrates transitions between process states: New, Ready, Running, Waiting, Terminated
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how processes move through different states during execution

diagrams.title: Virtual Memory Concept
diagrams.description: Shows mapping between virtual address space and physical memory using page tables
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtual memory extends available memory

diagrams.title: System Call Interface Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how application requests kernel services through system calls
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the path from user request to OS service execution
